summary: Hardened inbox task assignment boundaries so non-roster carrier/runtime labels cannot be auto-admitted as task assignees.

corrective_audit.note: Live audit joined task_assignments and concrete directed_obligations against the SQLite roster and found no current non-roster concrete assignment targets.

preventive_change.behavior: Resolve assignment target against existing active roster before task creation or promotion. Do not auto-create roster identities during inbox promotion.
preventive_change.carrier_runtime_warning: narada.claude-code and narada.native style labels are reported as carrier/runtime labels, not admitted task identities.

verification: Focused inbox tests for non-roster assignment and existing assigned flows passed.
Live preflight probe with assign=narada.claude-code returned agent_not_in_roster and left task count unchanged.
Direct task claim with narada.claude-code failed with a rejected assignment_intent_id.
